# Oaks & Bims Nigeria Limited

> Full-service real estate company helping Nigerians at home and in the diaspora buy, develop, and manage property across all 36 states of Nigeria. Known for verified titles, transparent pricing, and dedicated support for overseas buyers.

## Services

- **Real Estate Development** — Residential and mixed-use developments built from concept to keys across Nigeria.
- **Property Management** — Tenant sourcing, rent collection, maintenance, and reporting; tailored for property owners based abroad.
- **Purchasing & Acquisition** — End-to-end search, due-diligence, negotiation, and legal closing on behalf of buyers.
- **After-sale Care** — Renovation, fit-out, and ongoing maintenance to protect and grow your investment long-term.

## Who we serve

- Nigerian buyers seeking homes, land, or investment properties in any of the 36 states and the FCT (Abuja).
- Diaspora Nigerians in the UK, USA, Canada, UAE, Ireland, and beyond who want to invest back home without the stress.
- First-time buyers who need end-to-end guidance from search to keys.
- Experienced investors growing a rental or development portfolio in Nigeria.

## Key differentiators

- Every listing carries a verified Certificate of Occupancy (C of O) or equivalent title document — verified by an independent solicitor before going live.
- Prices shown in NGN (Nigerian Naira), USD, and GBP to serve diaspora buyers.
- Escrow-backed payments available so your funds are protected until deal completion.
- Live virtual property tours via video call for remote and overseas buyers.
- Zero hidden charges — full cost breakdown provided before any commitment.
- 24/7 diaspora support desk staffed by people who understand the UK, US, and Nigerian markets.

## Property types available

Detached houses, semi-detached houses, duplexes, bungalows, apartments, flats, penthouses, studio apartments, land (residential and commercial), commercial properties, offices, shops, warehouses, mixed-use developments.

## Geographic coverage

All 36 states of Nigeria plus the FCT. Primary markets include:
- **Lagos** (Lekki, Ikoyi, Victoria Island, Ajah, Gbagada, Ikeja, Surulere)
- **Abuja / FCT** (Maitama, Asokoro, Wuse, Gwarinpa, Lokogoma, Lugbe)
- **Rivers** (Port Harcourt, GRA, Rumuola, Trans-Amadi)
- **Oyo** (Ibadan, Ring Road, Bodija, Challenge)
- **Anambra** (Awka, Onitsha, Nnewi)
- **Enugu** (GRA, Independence Layout, Agbani Road)

- [Homepage](/) — Company overview, featured listings, and services.
- [Browse Properties](/properties) — Full searchable listing with filters for state, purpose, property type, bedrooms, and price.

- [Log In](/login) — Access your buyer account.

## Contact & location

- Website: oaksandbims.com
- RC Number: 1754177 (Corporate Affairs Commission, Nigeria)
- Location: Lagos, Nigeria (appointments only)
- Languages: English

## Frequently asked questions

**Do you serve buyers outside Nigeria?**
Yes. We have a dedicated diaspora desk and have helped buyers in the UK, USA, Canada, UAE, Ireland, and Australia purchase property in Nigeria remotely.

**Are all titles verified?**
Every property listed on Oaks & Bims has its title verified by an independent solicitor before it is published.

**Can I pay in USD or GBP?**
Yes. All listings display prices in NGN, USD, and GBP. We can guide you through compliant cross-border payment options.

**What is your fee structure?**
We operate on a transparent fixed-fee basis with no hidden charges. All costs are disclosed in writing before you commit to anything.

**Do you offer virtual tours?**
Yes. Live video tours of any listed property can be arranged at a time that suits your time zone.
